S1_SM_Tanza_fresh.notes: Confirmed post-fix — no test.supervisor Accounts User grant needed. BLOCK-1 production code path works for real store crew.

S2_SM_Megamall.reason: StoreOrderingPage.submit() fails to extract BEI-ORD-YYYY-NNNNN from page body after clicking Submit. 30s race-timeout returns body-len~22754 with no regex match. No new order persisted in the DB from this path. Likely SM Megamall's post-submit UI transition differs from SM Tanza (different success indicator, toast auto-dismiss, or redirect pattern).
S2_SM_Megamall.fix_direction: Harden submit() extraction: (a) fallback poll Frappe via queryDocs({owner, creation>=before_submit, docstatus:0}) when UI regex misses; (b) capture screenshot on miss for diagnosis; (c) expand success indicator regex.

S3_Grid_Rockwell_negative.reason: Order BEI-ORD-2026-00280 created + approved + MR MAT-MR-2026-00135 Ordered. But dispatch never produced a Stock Entry — SEs=0, WRs=0. wrForDispatch polled 90s, returned null. No error in backend Error Log.
S3_Grid_Rockwell_negative.fix_direction: Capture dispatch-dialog state (screenshot + dialog DOM) in the spec; verify the #sourceWarehouse fill step triggers onChange; confirm Create Transfer click hits backend. Possibly the dialog form silently fails validation when the spec sets source manually vs letting UI pre-fill.

S4_Ayala_Evo_dedupe.notes: SI customer = BEBANG MEGA INC. (matches S1). Multi-store same-entity dedup confirmed.
